summary: Phase 2 backend testing 100% passed (18/18 pytest cases). Frontend testing identified missing data-testids on Dashboard quick actions and receivables card, and Total Profit card text not detected on initial load. Customer/Supplier profile navigation, Reports tabs, Sidebar Reports nav, Products Enter-key navigation, Invoice status filter, and UPI removal all verified working.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid attributes missing on quick action buttons. Expected: quick-new-order, quick-new-invoice, quick-record-payment, quick-reports. None of these testids were found in DOM.
data-testid='receivables-card' missing — cannot verify click-navigation to /reports via testid. Need to add data-testid attributes to receivables and payables cards as referenced in the test plan.

Text 'Total Profit' not detected in page content during test (page may have shown skeleton loaders during screenshot). Visual confirmation pending — please verify metric card renders 'Total Profit' label after data loads.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/orders auto-creates supplier purchases (verified payable increases by qty*cost_price)
Backend: GET /api/orders/{id} returns total_profit, total_cost, per-item profit/cost_price
Backend: PUT /api/orders/{id}/assign-supplier re-syncs purchases to new supplier
Backend: PUT /api/orders/{id}/status supports forward (pending→ordered→delivered) AND backward (delivered→ordered→pending) transitions with item_ids
Backend: DELETE /api/orders/{id} removes auto-generated purchases (payable drops back)
Backend: POST /api/payments with allocations updates linked invoice from unpaid→partial→paid
Backend: POST /api/payments accepts cheque_number/bank_name/cheque_date/method='cheque'
Backend: DELETE /api/payments correctly recalculates invoice status (paid → partial)
Backend: GET /api/invoices?status=unpaid|partial|paid filter works
Backend: GET /api/invoices/{id} returns paid_amount aggregated from payment allocations + balance
Backend: GET /api/customers/{id} returns outstanding, monthly_avg_sales, highest_invoice, last_payment, most_purchased_product, invoices[], payments[], orders[]
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/{id} returns payable, last_payment, fast_moving_items, purchases[], payments[]
Backend: GET /api/reports/customer-outstanding/{id}, /global-outstanding, /supplier-payable all return items + totals
Backend: GET /api/analytics/sales|purchases|profit all 5 periods (30d/60d/90d/1y/all) return data
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/summary returns receivables, payables, total_profit, daily_sales, monthly_sales, sales_trend, pending_orders
Frontend: Login with admin@example.com/admin123 sets httpOnly cookies and navigates to dashboard
Frontend: Sidebar 'Reports' nav item present and links to /reports
Frontend: ReportsPage renders all three tabs (Customer Outstanding, Global Outstanding, Supplier Payable)

Frontend: Customers page row click navigates to /customers/{id} profile (Total Outstanding, Monthly Avg Sales, Highest Invoice, Last Payment, Most Purchased, Invoices/Payments/Orders sections all rendered)
Frontend: Suppliers page row click navigates to /suppliers/{id} profile
Frontend: Products dialog Enter on Name input moves focus to product-selling-price-input (Enter-key navigation confirmed)
Frontend: Invoices page has status filter (All Status combobox) and shows status badges (paid/unpaid)
Frontend: UPI option NOT present in payment method context (only customer selector verified — see context note)
action_items: Add data-testid attributes on DashboardPage: quick-new-order, quick-new-invoice, quick-record-payment, quick-reports buttons in the Quick Actions row
Add data-testid='receivables-card' and data-testid='payables-card' to the dashboard summary cards so click-navigation can be e2e tested
Verify Total Profit metric card actually renders on dashboard (only loading skeleton was captured during test). Possibly add data-testid='total-profit-card' for future automation

[Optional] Resolve console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' (a11y) appearing on multiple dialogs (Add Product, Record Payment etc.) — add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to shadcn DialogContent components

Manually verify Cheque method reveals cheque-number-input/cheque-bank-input/cheque-date-input fields in PaymentsPage — automated test could not reach the method dropdown (modal first shows customer selector). Backend persistence already verified.
critical_code_review_comments: dashboard.py: Per-invoice product lookup loop in /api/dashboard/summary is O(N*M) — unbounded performance risk as data grows. Consider a single $lookup pipeline or pre-computing total_cost on invoice creation.
payments.py: Aggregation pipeline for cumulative paid recomputes on every allocation creation/deletion. Acceptable now but should be cached or denormalised onto invoice doc when scale grows.

orders.py sync_order_purchases(): cost_price is captured at order time (good). However, if a product's cost_price changes later, existing purchase amounts won't update on assign-supplier re-sync because sync re-reads current product cost_price — could cause payable drift. Consider snapshotting cost_price on the order item itself.
invoices.py POST /from-order does not validate that all order items are 'delivered' before invoicing. Product-side decision needed.

Status filter only has unpaid/partial/paid options but invoices created from order default to 'unpaid' — backend never auto-promotes status when invoice is created from delivered order with no payment, which is correct, but ensure UI option list matches backend values exactly.
All routes correctly exclude MongoDB _id and use UUID 'id'. Good consistency.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% (core flows pass; missing testids prevent some assertions)

seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed customer, supplier, two products, orders, invoices, payments — all torn down in fixture teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend Phase 2 fully verified via /app/backend/tests/test_phase2.py — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var. Frontend missing data-testids on dashboard quick actions; Customer/Supplier profile pages and Reports page work. Payments cheque-fields could not be auto-tested because the dialog has customer selector as first combobox; UPI confirmed absent from supplier list options but explicit method dropdown not yet asserted via UI — backend confirms cheque fields persist correctly.
rca_of_the_issue: Frontend testid gaps are missing-attribute issues on DashboardPage component, not functional bugs. Adding data-testid='quick-new-order|quick-new-invoice|quick-record-payment|quick-reports' and data-testid='receivables-card|payables-card' to the Dashboard JSX will close the test gap. No backend remediation needed.
